page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A versatile open source tool for metagenomics (USEARCH alternative)
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: High-throughput search and clustering sequence analysis tool. it supports de novo and reference based chimera detection, clustering, full-length and prefix dereplication, reverse complementation, masking, all-vs-all pairwise global alignment, exact and global alignment searching, shuffling, subsampling and sorting. it also supports fastq file analysis, filtering and conversion.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: High-throughput search and clustering sequence analysis tool. It supports de novo and reference based chimera detection, clustering, full-length and prefix dereplication, reverse complementation, masking, all-vs-all pairwise global alignment, exact and global alignment searching, shuffling, subsampling and sorting. It also supports FASTQ file analysis, filtering and conversion.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: High-throughput search and clustering sequence analysis tool. It supports de novo and reference based chimera detection, clustering, full-length and prefix dereplication, reverse complementation, masking, all-vs-all pairwise global alignment, exact and global alignment searching, shuffling, subsampling and sorting. It also supports FASTQ file analysis, filtering and conversion.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: VSEARCH including searching, clustering, chimera detection, dereplication, sorting, masking and shuffling of sequences.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: High-throughput search and clustering sequence analysis tool. It supports de novo and reference based chimera detection, clustering, full-length and prefix dereplication, reverse complementation, masking, all-vs-all pairwise global alignment, exact and global alignment searching, shuffling, subsampling and sorting. It also supports FASTQ file analysis, filtering and conversion.
